extract: Greninja (Japanese: ゲッコウガ Gekkouga) is a dual-type Water/Dark Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Frogadier starting at level 36. It is the final form of Froakie. Greninja with the Ability Battle Bond are treated internally as a distinct form. Battle Bond activates upon defeating an opponent; in Generation VII, it allows Greninja to change into a special form known as Ash-Greninja. However, following the removal of Ash-Greninja in Generation IX, Battle Bond was reworked to instead increase Greninja's stats. Greninja can Mega Evolve into Mega Greninja using the Greninjite. Mega Greninja was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.)
